not_enough_players: %prefix% There wasn't enough players to start the raid!
no_available_locations: %prefix% Failed to start raid. All possible locations are busy.

commands.checkbanned_no_banned_held_items: %prefix% There are no banned held items!
commands.checkbanned_no_banned_bag_items: %prefix% There are no banned bag items!

feedback.used_voucher: %prefix% You've successfully started a raid for %boss_name%!
feedback.added_to_queue: %prefix% %boss_name% has been added to the queue!

warnings.no_pass: %prefix% This raid requires a pass to join!
warnings.already_in_raid: %prefix% You're already participating in a raid!
warnings.no_pass_needed: %prefix% This raid does not require a pass!
warnings.not_joinable: %prefix% This raid is no longer joinable!
warnings.not_enough_pokemon: %prefix% You need at least %raid_min_party_size% pokemon to join this raid!
warnings.too_many_pokemon: %prefix% You can only have up to %raid_max_party_size% pokemon in this raid!
warnings.minimum_level: %prefix% Your pokemon must be above level %raid_min_level%!
warnings.maximum_level: %prefix% Your pokemon must be below level %raid_max_level%!
warnings.battle_during_raid: %prefix% You can't battle wild pokemon during a raid!
warnings.raid_pokeball_outside_raid: %prefix% You can't use raid pokeballs outside of a raid!
warnings.not_catch_phase: %prefix% You can only use this during the catch phase!
warnings.normal_pokeball: %prefix% You can only use raid pokeballs in a raid!
